subcodes.first_line: O Shamsiyyih! God willing, by the loving-kindness of the Countenance of Divine Unity, thou shalt, even as the sun, shine forth from the horizon of the heaven of certitude [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای شمسیه انشاء الله بعنایت طلعت احدیه چون شمس از افق سماء ایقان مشرق و لائح
